package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for no_streaming_for_large_export_handler: Large list or export handlers that materialize everything before writing rather than using chunked or streaming output.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule330NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule330NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule330NegativeRecord) (Rule330NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario330Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule330NegativeService, input Rule330NegativeRecord) (Rule330NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule330NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
